expectations.evidence: setStatusToClosed renamed to closeAccount (business intent); proc renamed to closeAccount (meaningful name)
Verb pairs are consistent; no asymmetric verb usage detected
isNotActive replaced with isActive (positive boolean), logic inverted with !isActive
All single-letter variables eliminated; abbreviated properties (ts, buf, uid) accessed via descriptive record properties (startTimestamp, endTimestamp, buffer, userId)
ms renamed to elapsedMs; sz renamed to bufferSizeBytes
usr→user, acct→accountId, amt→amount, buf→buffer; no unused params remain
Cart/items never mutated; readonly modifiers on all interfaces; new arrays created via .map() and .reduce()
All numeric literals are within named config constants (WEIGHT_TIERS, COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS, MAX_ITEM_WEIGHT_KG) with descriptive property keys
No any type used; explicit interfaces for Cart, CartItem, ShippedItem, ShippingResult; index signature uses unknown not any
WEIGHT_TIERS, COUNTRY_MULTIPLIERS, FREE_SHIPPING_COUPONS, MAX_ITEM_WEIGHT_KG are all top-level exported config constants
Invalid weight throws (weight <= 0 || weight > MAX_ITEM_WEIGHT_KG); unknown country throws via getCountryMultiplier; unmatched coupon acceptably returns false
